NetHub2026
Details Speakers Register

April 18-19, 2026 · Austin, TX

Where networking leaders, builders, and operators shape the connected future.

NetHub2026 brings together cloud architects, edge innovators, security teams, and product leaders for two days of hands-on talks, live demos, and high-signal conversations.

Reserve Your Pass Meet Speakers
2Days
24+Sessions
40Speakers
1Expo Floor

Event details

Join us at the Austin Convention Center for keynotes, breakout labs, and a demo hall focused on practical infrastructure, observability, AI at the edge, and secure platform design.

Why attend

  • • Learn patterns you can apply the same week.
  • • Compare tools with builders who use them in production.
  • • Meet peers solving scale, latency, and reliability challenges.

Speaker highlights

Maya Chen

VP Platform, Vertex Cloud

How to simplify multi-region networking without sacrificing resilience.

Diego Ramos

Principal Engineer, SignalMesh

A practical playbook for secure service-to-service communication at scale.

Aisha Patel

Head of AI Infra, Northstar Labs

Deploying low-latency AI workflows across cloud and edge environments.

Ready to join NetHub2026?

Lock in your seat now and get early access to session scheduling, workshop selection, and networking events.
